summary: App with login flow (forgot password, phone number login) that opens a new 'Add Contact Details' tab after successful login, displaying the user's name at the top.
architectural_notes: Login flow includes forgot password and phone number-only login options
Post-login navigation leads to an 'Add Contact Details' screen/tab

existing_features.title: After a successful login, automatically navigate the user to a new 'Add Contact Details' screen/tab instead of landing directly on the Dashboard.
On the 'Add Contact Details' screen, display the logged-in user's name prominently at the top of the page.

Create an 'Add Contact Details' form screen with fields for the user to enter their contact information (full name, phone number, email address). Include a 'Save' button to submit and a 'Skip' button to proceed to the Dashboard without saving.
After saving or skipping the contact details step, navigate the user to the main Dashboard.

new_feature_requests.summary: After login, open a new tab/screen for adding contact details, with user's name shown at the top
Store submitted contact details (full name, phone number, email) in the backend so they can be retrieved later.
